description_long: This is a large, modern bed with a rectangular form, featuring a teal-blue fitted sheet covering a thick mattress. The bed sits atop a beige, quilted box spring base supported by six black legs, providing stability and elevation. Two rectangular pillows with blue, white, and gray striped pillowcases are placed at the head of the bed, adding a touch of color contrast. The bed lacks both a headboard and a footboard, giving it a minimalist, utilitarian appearance. The overall design suggests comfort and practicality, suitable for urban living spaces or temporary accommodations. The materials and construction indicate a standard double or queen size, commonly found in apartments, hotels, or furnished rooms.
description: A modern, minimalist bed with a teal-blue sheet, striped pillows, and a beige quilted base on black legs. The bed has no headboard or footboard, emphasizing a simple, functional design.
description_view_0: The bed is seen from the side, showing two striped pillows stacked at the left end and the quilted beige base with black legs.
description_view_1: A front view reveals the full width of the bed, with both pillows separated and the teal-blue sheet stretched smoothly across the mattress.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the pillows stacked at the right end, with the same quilted base and black legs visible.
description_view_3: A rear view shows the pillows placed side by side near the back edge, highlighting the symmetry and the bed's overall rectangular shape.
